name: Modern City RPG
description:
[✭]
A RPG set in a large city with 4 modes. In mid-testing. 

It has 1 contemporary mode, 1 high fantasy mode, 2 urban fantasy modes, each mode description is in the definition. You may need to tweak replies just a bit. 


I unfortunately do not know the artist, if you do, please tell me!
creator: AnonTree
